ideation: This sequence simulates the up and down motion of playing with a yo-yo. The right arm will primarily perform the yo-yo action, while the left arm remains relatively still for balance.  The animation will focus on the controlled movement of the right arm, mimicking the smooth arc of a yo-yo. I will use the two shoulder joints to create the illusion of a string and the yo-yo's movement.  The wrist will remain mostly neutral, only slightly adjusting to emphasize the yo-yo's arc.  The left arm will remain in a neutral position to help maintain visual balance and avoid distracting from the yo-yo action.  Checking examples will help ensure the arm transitions are fluid and natural.

frames.beat: arms rest, right arm poised for action
right arm swings up, yo-yo ascends
right arm drops, yo-yo spins down
right arm swings up again, yo-yo returns
